_comment: Hand-labeled natural discrepancies, labeled by DATA TRUTH. NOTE: the improvement spec (§P0-1) labels record 12 as '1 Critical type-C', but a rigorous read of the data shows record 12 is a clean medication-INITIATION visit (all four medication_labels meds are authoredOn the visit date / is_new_today, and the note explicitly says therapy was 'never started'). There is no pre-visit stale-active span, so the correct label is 'clean'. Labeling it Critical here would score the (correct) system as a miss. The real, data-grounded type-C anchor is record 10.

10.note: Longitudinal med list carries simvastatin (duplicate to active atorvastatin) and an old metoprolol 50mg ER dose as active; the visit discontinues both with no FHIR stop resource -> stale chart / duplicate therapy.

12.note: Medication initiation visit. The four medication_labels meds are same-day new orders (is_new_today); note says therapy was 'never started'. No stale-active span -> the Guardian should stay silent. (Spec labeled this Critical-C; the data does not support it.)

13.note: Note faithfully documents the cannabis use (DAST-10 scored) and the domestic-abuse disclosure (HARK-2), and the flu vaccine is captured as an Immunization resource. Nothing material to surface.
